data.title: Donald Trump: Despite military victories, Iran’s nuclear threat must be addressed | The Jerusalem Post
data.description: Trump told Newsmax that while Iran's military is heavily damaged, only a guarantee against nuclear development will secure a lasting peace, calling for stronger global action.
data.keywords: Iran,Nuclear,Tehran,Iran Deal,islamic regime,nuclear bomb,Donald Trump,blockade,NATO,Islamic Republic,strait of hormuz,CENTCOM,Operation Epic Fury
